title: 別のオブジェクトをthisとして呼び出す

input.factory: () => ({ item: { price: 120, count: 3 }, discount: 50, calc: function(discount) { return this.price * this.count - discount; } })
() => ({ item: { price: 980, count: 2 }, discount: 0, calc: function(discount) { return this.price * this.count - discount; } })
() => ({ item: { price: 450, count: 1 }, discount: 30, calc: function(discount) { return this.price * this.count - discount; } })

cases.name: 合計額と割引額が同じ商品

input.factory: () => ({ item: { price: 250, count: 4 }, discount: 1000, calc: function(discount) { return this.price * this.count - discount; } })
